expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgen으로 short-id 생성 및 state directory 생성
expectations.evidence: No session ID or state directory. Baseline starts with codebase keyword search.
No agent spawning. Single agent performs all analysis.

expectations.text: Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.json의 dimensions.failure_type이 data_loss 관련 값 포함
expectations.evidence: No seed-analysis.json. No structured dimension evaluation.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspective-generator가 seed-analysis.json의 payment/data 관련 findings를 읽고 financial archetype 매핑
expectations.evidence: No perspective generation. No archetype mapping system.
No perspectives.json. Though the baseline organically identifies payment-related concerns, no formal financial perspective is generated.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: financial perspective의 model이 opus, agent_type이 architect (archetype table 일치)
Phase 0.55: perspectives.json에 rules_applied와 complexity_scaling_correct 필드 존재
expectations.evidence: No rules_applied or complexity scaling fields.

expectations.text: Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestion으로 perspective 승인 요청 후 perspectives.json에 approved=true 추가
Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping 실행 (prism_docs_roots 호출 시도)
expectations.evidence: No ontology scope mapping. Baseline mentions monitoring tools as 'What I Would Do Next' but doesn't execute ontology mapping.

expectations.text: Phase 0.8: context.json에 research_summary가 seed-analysis.json의 research 데이터를 반영
Phase 1: financial-analyst가 extended-archetypes.md의 Financial Lens 섹션 + finding-protocol.md로 spawn
expectations.evidence: No separate financial analyst agent. Analysis performed by single baseline agent.

expectations.text: Phase 1: 각 analyst가 perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.json에 analyst, findings[] 필드 작성
Phase 2A: finding 분석가 shutdown 후 TaskOutput으로 drain
Phase 2B: verifier가 findings.json을 읽은 후 prism_interview 실행
expectations.evidence: No verification phase. No prism_interview calls. Baseline lists 'How I Would Verify Findings' as manual hypothetical steps.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.md에 모든 perspective의 검증 결과 통합
Phase 3: report.md 템플릿의 모든 섹션이 analyst-findings.md 기반으로 채워짐
expectations.evidence: No template-based report. Output has ad-hoc sections: 'Phase 1-5', 'Structure Used', 'Limitations'. Missing Socratic Verification Summary, Prevention Checklist, Integrated Analysis.
